name: polymarket-research
description: Perform read-only Polymarket research using public Gamma, CLOB, and Data APIs or the bundled Python helper. Use when the user explicitly asks for Polymarket market discovery, market-implied probabilities, order books, spreads, price history, or recent trades. Do not use for generic financial research, betting advice, wallet access, or trade execution.

permissions.notes: Read-only public API access. No trading, wallet auth, order placement, or financial advice.

resources.description: Endpoint reference adapted from Hermes Agent Polymarket skill.
Bundled Python CLI helper for read-only Polymarket searches, market details, books, histories, and trades.
